max_ingredients.description: Maximum total number of selected items (bottles + non-bottles) (CP-SAT limit).

alpha.description: Tradeoff weight between coverage and objective score

use_log_scores.description: If true, use log-transformed scores when building the objective.

score_scale.description: Scaling applied to computed scores before converting to integer coefficients.

use_rank_scores.description: If true, use rank-based scores instead of raw/log scores.

ingredient_mode.description:
Controls which ingredient types are selectable.
- bottles_only: only bottle-true ingredients
- non_bottles_only: only bottle-false ingredients
- both: bottle and non-bottle ingredients

objective_scale.description: Multiplier to keep CP-SAT objective coefficients as integers (larger => larger scaling).

num_search_workers.description: CP-SAT parallelism. 0 means 'auto' (use all available CPU cores).

max_time_in_seconds.description: Time limit for the CP-SAT solve. 0 means no time limit.

log_search_progress.description: If true, enable OR-Tools internal search progress logs.

print_incumbent_solutions.description: If true, print periodic progress messages while CP-SAT is solving.
